business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotels, restaurants, and corporate office locations across Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Total insured value across 8 locations is $168,230,000. 2 property claims in prior period totaling $215,927 incurred.

positives: Majority of properties are Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Modern building stock with most properties built after 1998
Diversified portfolio across hotels, restaurants, and office use
Positive net income of $3,220,600 and equity position of $52,535,400
concerns: High workers compensation claim frequency (28 claims)
Claim count increased to 11 in the 2024 policy year
Carrier has changed multiple times over the past 5 years
Concentration of risk in Texas (catastrophe exposure - wind/hail)
Hospitality/restaurant occupancy with higher GL exposure
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history shows 38 total claims across WC (28), GL (8), and Property (2) coverages with combined total incurred of approximately $714,517. Claim counts have fluctuated year over year, rising to 11 in 2024.
